cardeffect.clone: Create a copy of the highest costing card in hand and add it to hand
cardeffect.discarddraw: If this card is discarded, draw 1 card
cardeffect.discarddraw.plural: If this card is discarded, draw {Amount} cards
cardeffect.discardhealth: If this card is discarded, recover {Amount} HP
cardeffect.discardmana: If this card is discarded, recover {Amount} MP
cardeffect.discardhighestcost: Discard the highest costing card in hand
cardeffect.discardlowestcost: Discard the lowest costing card in hand
cardeffect.discardxmanaadd: Discard a card, add 1 MP for each card discarded this way
cardeffect.discardxmanaadd.plural: Discard up to {Amount} cards from hand, add {Stack} MP for each card discarded this way
cardeffect.discardxprotection: Discard a card, gain {Stack} Protection for each card discarded this way
cardeffect.discardxprotection.plural: Discard up to {Amount} cards from hand, gain {Stack} Protection for each card discarded this way
cardeffect.gainstrengthondiscard: If this card is discarded, gain {Stack} Strength
cardeffect.drawexhaust: Draw 1 Card, then Exhaust this card
cardeffect.drawexhaust.plural: Draw {Amount} Cards, then Exhaust this card
cardeffect.enchantedonly: Only playable if the owner has Enchantment
cardeffect.enchanteddraw: If the owner has Enchantment, draw {Amount} cards
cardeffect.enchantedmanarecover: If the owner has Enchantment, recover {Amount} MP
cardeffect.lowercostsamecard: Reduce the cost of this card by {Amount} for the duration of the battle
cardeffect.lowercostallinhand: Reduce the cost of all cards in hand by {Amount} for this turn
cardeffect.maxindeck: Can hold up to {Amount} cards named {0} in deck
cardeffect.powerinhand: Attacks on this card gain power equal to the amount of cards named '{0}' in hand
cardeffect.gainstrengthifhashaste: If the owner has Haste, gain {Stack} Strength
cardeffect.doubledamagehealthpercentage: If target's HP is above 90% of their Max HP, attacks on this card deal double damage
cardeffect.attacklosemaxhealthpercentage: After attacking, take fixed damage equal to {Amount}% of Max HP
cardeffect.healthpotion: Target heals by {Percent}% of their Max HP
cardeffect.discardalliesdraw: If this card is discarded, all allies draw 1 card
cardeffect.discardalliesdraw.plural: If this card is discarded, all allies draw {Amount} cards
cardeffect.discardalliesgainprotection: If this card is discarded, all allies gain {Stack} Protection
cardeffect.discardalliesgainstrength: If this card is discarded, all allies gain {Stack} Strength
cardeffect.discardhandgainactionpower: Discard your hand (except this card), gain {Power} Action Power for each card discarded this way
cardeffect.damageequaltotargetbleed: Damage dealt by this card is equal to the target's Bleed stacks
cardeffect.damageequaltotargetburn: Damage dealt by this card is equal to the target's Burn stacks
cardeffect.damageequaltoownerprotection: Damage dealt by this card is equal to the owner's Protection stacks
cardeffect.detonatetargetburn: Deal damage equal to half of the target's Burn stacks (rounded down), then remove all Burn from target
cardeffect.drawifhashaste: If the owner has Haste, draw {Amount} card
cardeffect.drawifhashaste.plural: If the owner has Haste, draw {Amount} cards
cardeffect.gainshieldperhastemultiplier: Gain {Multiplier}x Shield for each stack of Haste the owner has (Max. {MaxShield})
cardeffect.afterenchantedcardonly: Only playable turn after playing an Enchantment card
cardeffect.discardhanddealdamage: Discard your hand, deal {Damage} damage for each card discarded this way
cardeffect.discardhandgainpower: Discard your hand, actions on this card gain {Power} power for each card discarded this way
cardeffect.discardxgainshieldbycost: Discard a card, gain {Shield} Shield for each MP the discarded card costs
cardeffect.discardxgainshieldbycost.plur: Discard up to {Amount} cards from hand, gain {Shield} Shield for each MP the discarded cards costs
cardeffect.protectiongivesfortify: For each stack of Protection the owner has, gain {Stack} Fortify (Max. {MaxStack})
cardeffect.protectiongivesfortifynexttur: For each stack of Protection the owner has, gain {Stack} Fortify next turn (Max. {MaxStack})
cardeffect.gainshieldifenchanted: If the owner has Enchantment, gain {Shield} Shield
actioneffect.inflictbleedconditional: On hit, Inflict {Stack} Bleed, or {BonusStack} Bleed if the target has Bleed
actioneffect.absorbbleedheal: On hit, Absorb {Stack} Bleed from target to heal self for {Heal}HP
actioneffect.absorballbleedheal: On hit, Absorb all Bleed from target to heal self for {Heal}HP per stack absorbed
actioneffect.inflictslownextturn: On hit, Inflict {Stack} Slow next turn
actioneffect.bonusdamageiffastest: If the user is the fastest, gains {BonusDamage} Bonus Damage
